description: Basilica of Our Lady of the Assumption is a minor basilica located in Secunderabad. The decree designating it as a basilica was issued on 7 November 2008. description: St. Anthony’s Shrine at Mettuguda is in Secunderabad, Telangana State, India which is just 100 feet away from Mettuguda Metro station. Here is enshrined the miraculous statue of St. Anthony of Padua. Thousands of pilgrims from all over the twin cities and the districts of Telugu States flock the shrine throughout the year to pray for their needs and thank God for the favors received.
